codeReview.summary: Reviewed the handoff, commit diff, and transcript skeleton for feature tui-full-features. The implementation adds orchestrator base instructions, wires them into Codex thread creation, renders fenced code blocks distinctly in chat, and extends tests for base-instruction coverage, markdown rendering, and company-picker interactions. No high-confidence correctness defects were found in the reviewed changes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The tui-worker skill prescribes a strict tests-first workflow, but this worker implemented production files before adding new tests; this suggests the skill procedure may be too rigid for incremental feature-completion work where large parts already exist.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl session 485ac2b7-ef7a-40da-a601-b03e2f4b3c17 shows Create/Edit on src/codex/base-instructions.ts, src/components/App.tsx, and src/components/MessageList.tsx before later Edit calls to __tests__/chat.test.tsx, __tests__/codex-client.test.ts, __tests__/integration.test.tsx, and __tests__/panels.test.tsx.

summary: Feature tui-full-features passes scrutiny: required behavior is implemented and covered by targeted tests, with no blocking or non-blocking code defects identified from the reviewed diff and transcript evidence.
